prompt_task: Borzoi (Linder et al., doi:10.1038/s41588-024-02053-6) and Sei (Chen et al., doi:10.1038/s41588-022-01102-2) are both DNA sequence models trained to predict genomic assay outputs. Out of the Sei tracks that are linked to a specific Cistrome ID, how many tracks share provenance with any of the tracks in Borzoi? Round your answer to the nearest 100. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
